# tess

> Header-only C++20 tile and path simulation substrate: bounded grid
> storage, topology-aware pathfinding, and deterministic queued updates,
> without an engine. MIT licensed.

Docs are contract-checked: every C++ snippet is byte-matched against
compiled, self-checking examples. Machine adoption recipe:
https://tess.owx.dev/for-agents/

## Docs

- [Home](https://tess.owx.dev/): positioning plus a complete checked
  quickstart with pinned output
- [Getting started](https://tess.owx.dev/getting-started/): the concept
  ladder — shapes, schemas, worlds, writes, pathfinding, topology,
  schedule, render bridge
- [Installation](https://tess.owx.dev/packaging/): FetchContent /
  find_package, supported include surface
- [Examples](https://tess.owx.dev/examples/): annotated self-checking
  example catalog
- [Use cases](https://tess.owx.dev/use-cases/): robotics, agent-based
  modeling, and headless-server framings
- [Concepts](https://tess.owx.dev/architecture/): normative design notes
  per subsystem
- [Performance](https://tess.owx.dev/performance/): measured medians and
  CI-enforced ceilings (single-threaded)
- [Roadmap](https://tess.owx.dev/roadmap/): shipped vs
  designed-but-deferred vs out-of-scope
- [Support](https://tess.owx.dev/support/): stability policy and channels
- [API reference](https://tess.owx.dev/api/): generated reference for the
  supported surface
